premium.legalNotice: By subscribing, you agree to our Terms of Use and Privacy Policy.

legal.aboutContent:
TarotNova is a next-generation guidance app combining ancient tarot wisdom with modern AI technology.

Version: 1.0.0
legal.privacyContent:
Your data is securely stored on Google Firebase infrastructure.

- Your personal information is never shared with 3rd parties.
- Google Gemini AI technology is used for tarot interpretations.
- You can delete your account and data at any time.

cardMessages.The Fool: Step fearlessly into new beginnings today.
cardMessages.The Magician: It is time to use your inner power and skills.
cardMessages.The High Priestess: Trust your intuition, answers are hidden within.
cardMessages.The Emperor: Bring order and stability to your life.
cardMessages.The Lovers: Listen to your heart and make important choices.
cardMessages.The Chariot: Move towards your goals using your willpower.
cardMessages.Strength: Embrace your courage and inner strength.
cardMessages.Wheel of Fortune: Accept the inevitable cycle of change.
cardMessages.Justice: Find balance and make fair decisions.
cardMessages.The Hanged Man: Pause and reflect to gain a different perspective.
cardMessages.Death: Let go of the old, be ready for a great transformation.
cardMessages.Temperance: Put harmony and balance at the center of your life.
cardMessages.The Devil: Recognize and break the chains that limit you.
cardMessages.The Tower: Sudden changes are opportunities to build a new foundation.
cardMessages.The Star: Do not lose your hope and inspiration.
cardMessages.The Moon: Believe in the guidance of your subconscious and dreams.
cardMessages.Judgement: Evaluate the past and experience rebirth.
